    multimedia/ffmpeg: enable LTO by default on aarch64 and amd64

    6% faster decode at least with HEVC and MPEG-2 (HDTV) + -vf bwdif

    PR:             271798
    Inspired by:    Apline, Arch, Chimera, CRUX, Fedora, OpenMandriva, Solus
